name: Country Coach Inc
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. Listed on web as 'Bus for Sale, Bus Consultant' — appears to be a used-bus dealer/broker rather than an operating transportation contractor.
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET — appears to be a used bus dealer/consultant/broker out of Great Meadows NJ, not a school-bus operator. Should be excluded from Summit acquisition pipeline.

name: Lift-Up Inc
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. Operates as Wheelchair Getaways of CT (franchise) and Medical Home Care — sells/rents wheelchair-accessible vans and installs lifts/hand controls.
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET — wheelchair van rental/sales & mobility equipment dealer (Wheelchair Getaways franchise), not a student-transportation contractor. Exclude from pipeline.

name: Onebunchhookup LLC
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. Family-run NEMT provider serving New Orleans/Orleans Parish Medicaid recipients; not advertised as a school-bus or SPED student-transport contractor.
fit_notes: Marginal fit — pure NEMT/Medicaid transport, no school district contracts evident. Tiny (~8 employees). Low priority for Summit unless looking for SPED/NEMT adjacency in LA.

name: TNT Medi Van Transportation
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. Local taxi/medi-van service in Waukegan. Waukegan CUSD #60 student transport is contracted to Illinois Central School Bus, not TNT.
fit_notes: Marginal/low fit — primarily disabled/elderly medi-van service in Waukegan, not a school-bus contractor. Very small (~4 employees). Exclude unless explicitly targeting NEMT roll-up.

name: Linkdrive Express
districts_or_customers: Twin Cities Metro Area MN charter schools
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. Founded 2021; relatively new MN Type III (van/small-bus) student-transport operator. MC-753443 USDOT carrier. Hiring school van drivers in 2024-2025.
fit_notes: Best fit of the cohort — legitimate MN Type III student transport contractor (SPED, charter, out-of-district). Founded 2021, ~19 employees — young & small, low succession signal. Could be early-stage tuck-in or bolt-on to a MN platform; founder Jamal Omar likely active. Worth a screening conversation.
